title: cyperus patulus
intro: Cyperus patulus, also known as the flat sedge, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyperus patulus include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain and swelling, and treat digestive issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
